dollars a year i thought i had died and gone to heaven i was a little one-man operation there's nobody helped me i didn't have a secretary i did nothing but a phone and a beat up four hundred dollar pitted window permanently air conditioned Volkswagen so i understand what it's like to be upside down i'd go to get gas the first couple months i'd say fill it up mister and i know you're starting listening won't believe this but yeah when dan and i were starting this twenty five cents a gallon do you remember that dance i do remember that and again a good deal of it i could find one quarter down in the seat you were good to go yeah that's right i just i was buying a gallon at a time and my windshield wiper wasn't working so what i had to do is wipe off my windshield with my big fat hand you know with snow back in long island new york and then also mike fairy came on said you're nuts to work out here come out to california he taught me into changing my venue and i immediately went to california and made more money than i've ever made
